I guess I can forgive you then.#$b#Just don't say anything like that ever again.$u"/pause 500/faceDirection Abigail 1/pause 500/faceDirection Abigail 2/speak Abigail "Why don't you come sit under this tree with me?#$b#You're soaking wet, you should get out of the rain."/emote farmer 8/pause 500/speak Abigail "Don't be like that, we can absolutely try being friends again, I'm not one to hold a grudge.#$b#You'll have to work to earn back my trust, though.$u"/move farmer -1 0 0/move farmer 0 -1 2/emote Abigail 32/speak Abigail "It's nice up here...#$b#I love coming out here in the rain.$h"/pause 5000/viewport move 1 0 5000/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/pause 1000/action RemoveConversationTopic TransAbby_AbigailComingOut_BadResponse/eventSeen TransAbby_AbigailComingOut true/end dialogue Abigail "Thank you for apologising, @."
